characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 半开着的随身物件（如planner或笔记本）
mustShowEn: hand paused at the edge of a planner
partially open personal item (e.g., planner or notebook)
mayShowZh: 安静的室内环境（如书店过道）
其他文具（如自动铅笔、收据角、压平的叶子）
mayShowEn: other stationery items (e.g., mechanical pencil, receipt corner, pressed leaf)
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 本来只是顺手整理一下，结果因为planner停住了半秒。
